title: Quest 35150 1L Deep Fat Fryer - Non-Stick Basket With Removable Handle, 900 Watt, Easy Clean - Compact Design - White - 23 cm
features: 1L DEEP FAT FRYER - This 1-litre deep fat fryer provides you with the exciting option of cooking chip shop style chips from the comfort of your own home, and is great for couples, individuals or small families.

NON-STICK BOWL - The non-stick coated bowl ensures it is easy to discard of excess oils after frying, and makes it easy to clean. The basket features an ergonomic removable handle, and the basket size is the perfect for fitting anything from chips, to chicken, and fish.

VARIABLE THERMOSTAT – The dial on the front of the fryer gives a clear indication of the cooking temperatures required to cook certain food products. There are also two bright lights to indicate when the deep fat fryer is in action.

NON-SLIP FEET – This small deep fat fryer is built with non-slip feet, ensuring that the device stays anchored to the work surface throughout the cooking process, providing you additional peace of mind.

QUEST APPLIANCES - The Quest brand covers many cooking appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the kitchen. Visit the Quest Amazon page to view items such as omelette makers, waffle makers, teppanyaki grills, kettles, air-fryers and many more.
description: Product Description 1 Litre Capacity Compact Deep Fat Fryer Enjoy delicious fried chicken, chips, onion rings, and more from the comfort of your home with this Deep Fat Fryer. It features a stainless steel basket with a long removable handle, for easy and safe access. The fryer's temperature can be adjusted via the dial on the front, and also features useful power indicator lights. Previous page 1 Litre Oil Capacity With a capacity of 1 litres, the fryer's basket can cook for 1-2 people. Adjustable Temperature Simply turn the dial to get the temperature at your desired level between 130 and 190°C. Personal Sized The fryer's size makes it great for cooking yourself a meal of chicken, chips, fish, or other foods. Removable Basket The basket can safely be removed from the frying pot via the cool touch handle for serving/cleaning. Features Cooking Presets The front of the fryer features times & temperatures to help you cook 6 different foods. Next page 1 1 Litre Oil Capacity 2 Adjustable Temperature 3 Personal Sized 4 Removable Basket 5 Features Cooking Presets
